name: python3-aesedb
title: python3-aesedb
description:
async parser for JET (Python 3)
This package contains an async parser for JET. It mainly aims to provide an
async parsing option for NTDS.dit database file for obtaining user secrets. It
might also useful for parsing random JET databases.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use antdsparse because async parser for JET (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use antdsparse as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `antdsparse [options] [args]` as documented upstream for antdsparse.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair antdsparse with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `antdsparse --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
